summary: 116 tokens with 100% description coverage. Zero hardcoded colors, rgba, color-mix, or named colors outside tokens.css. Dark-mode contrast pass complete: all text roles AA (text-muted 5.2:1, was 4.05), accent borders ≥3:1 per WCAG 1.4.11, magenta ramp now monotonic dark→light like every other family. New semantic roles text.accent and text.on-accent give accent-colored text an AA-compliant home.

priorities.title: Breakpoint tokens deferred
priorities.detail: 3 breakpoint values (768px, 1024px, 767px) used in 8 media queries. Not tokenized yet — responsive behavior is still being defined. Revisit when adding responsive tokens to the DTCG source.

priorities.title: Layout constraints are art-directed
priorities.detail: 5 hardcoded layout values (280px, 320px, 400px, 1400px, 1600px) are playground-specific. They don't warrant tokens unless a second consumer needs the same constraints.

priorities.title: Small structural px are intentional
priorities.detail: 17 instances of 1-6px values (border-radius tweaks, padding adjustments). These are micro-adjustments below the spacing scale — tokenizing them would add overhead without design benefit.

priorities.title: Contrast over photography is unguaranteed
priorities.detail: The playground renders text over a photo behind a 0.78-opacity gradient; translucent panels let ~15% bleed through. Token math passes on solid surfaces but the warm gradient region (~#3c3228) drops some pairings below AA. Mitigation options: raise panel opacity, or keep body text inside solid-surface cards.

priorities.title: Desaturated dark-mode accent variant
priorities.detail: magenta-2 (#d60076) is 100% saturated and can vibrate against the blue canvas. The Material/HIG pattern is a slightly desaturated accent for dark themes. Taste-driven brand decision — explore separately from the accessibility pass.

strengths: Zero hardcoded colors in component CSS — complete tokenization (named colors now scanned too)
All text roles AA on canvas, surface, and elevated (contrast contract documented in tokens/CLAUDE.md)
Accent borders ≥3:1 vs canvas — interactive boundaries meet WCAG 1.4.11
All five color ramps monotonic dark→light by index — predictable for humans and agents
Zero hardcoded durations or easings — full motion tokenization
100% token description coverage — every $value has a $description
ARIA coverage on all interactive insight explorers
Self-contained token package with fonts — ready for extraction
Pure workspace orchestrator — root has no app dependencies
tokens/dist/tokens.css committed to git — always available after clone, no build step needed
risks: No automated visual regression baseline — verification is per-session via Claude Preview
No automated contrast check in CI — the WCAG matrix was run manually for this pass; values could drift in future token edits
